notes: Section, , , authorized assignment of quarters belonging to United States at an air base or other Air Force installation to officers, grade lieutenant general down to second lieutenant, 10 to 2 rooms, respectively, and prohibited other assignment where quarters existed.act Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 104170A Stat. 590
